## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### RTK / Tool Output Guardrails
*~5,833 tokens/session saved*
- For xarray SWE-bench tasks, avoid re-running the same `cd .../.forge/swe-bench/pydata__xarray-3364` shell probe repeatedly; consolidate diagnostics into one command and capture full output once.
- If `xarray/core/concat.py` or `xarray/tests/test_concat.py` output is truncated, raise the read limit or read the exact full file once instead of fetching adjacent slices repeatedly.

### Forge Harness
*~500 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge harness sessions, use only `mcp__forge__web_search` and `mcp__forge__web_fetch` for web access; do not use native/provider browsing tools.

### File Editing
*~443 tokens/session saved*
- Batch related edits to `xarray/core/concat.py` with one multi-edit after reading the target hunk; do not apply several tiny repeated edits to the same import/helper block.
- Batch related edits to `xarray/tests/test_concat.py`; read the insertion point once, then apply the whole test change in one edit.

### Python / Test Commands
*~167 tokens/session saved*
- In this xarray 3364 bench, default `python -m pytest ... | tail -30` can hide the real failure and was repeated; run once with full tee output, then inspect the saved log if needed.
- Use `~/.pyenv/versions/3.10.12/bin/python` for local xarray import/probe commands after default `python3` import failures, and consolidate probes into one script instead of repeated `-c` snippets.

### Task Tracking
*~68 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid repeated `mcp__forge__update_tasks` calls with the same checklist; update tasks only when a phase materially changes or completes.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
